use_cases: Display customer testimonials alongside quantified business metrics like cost savings
Build social proof by showcasing enterprise client logos (Netflix, Vercel, Amazon, Alibaba)
Highlight operational improvements such as reduction in manual tasks or reconciliation time
Demonstrate ROI with percentage-based performance indicators
Create trust signals for SaaS and fintech products seeking B2B customers
ai_summary: A testimonial card component featuring customer logos and key performance statistics displayed in a clean, minimalist layout. Includes hover tooltips and animated image scaling effects. Designed to build social proof for SaaS and fintech products by showcasing quantified business outcomes alongside recognizable client logos.
